EAGLE-1

OPERATION  DEEP STRIKE

// SELECT MISSION //
// PRIMARY OBJECTIVE //
DESTROY THE HIGH-VALUE TARGET
FLY DEEP INTO HOSTILE TERRITORY — FIND IT — LEVEL IT
// AIRCRAFT F-35C LIGHTNING II — HIGH SPEED, LIGHT ARMOR
// LOADOUT 6× GBU-31 JDAM · 25MM CANNON · 3× FLARES
// THREAT SAM SITES + AAA — CROSS HOSTILE TERRITORY
⚠ SAM WARNING: RADAR LOCKS AT HIGH ALT — HUG THE TERRAIN OR FLARE.
// PRIMARY OBJECTIVE //
DEFEND THE AIRFIELD
DESTROY ENEMY ARMOR BEFORE IT REACHES YOUR BASE
// AIRCRAFT A-10C WARTHOG — SLOW, HEAVILY ARMORED, LETHAL
// LOADOUT 12× Mk82 · 30MM GAU-8 CANNON · 8× FLARES
// THREAT ENEMY ARMOR CONVOY + MOBILE AA + MANPADS
// RESUPPLY FLY OVER BASE TO REARM (3 SEC HOVER)
⚠ TIMER: HOLD THE LINE UNTIL REINFORCEMENTS ARRIVE.
// SELECT DIFFICULTY //
W / ↑ PITCH UP
S / ↓ PITCH DOWN
D / → THROTTLE UP
A / ← THROTTLE DOWN
SPC CANNON
B BOMB
F FLARES
Q TURNAROUND
P PAUSE
